level1.name: target.n.01
level1.definition: a reference point to shoot at

level1.name: loneliness.n.01
level1.definition: the state of being alone in solitary isolation

level1.name: angstrom.n.01
level1.definition: a metric unit of length equal to one ten billionth of a meter (or 0.0001 micron); used to specify wavelengths of electromagnetic radiation

level2.name: reference_point.n.01
level2.definition: an indicator that orients you generally

level2.name: isolation.n.01
level2.definition: a state of separation between persons or groups

level2.name: metric_linear_unit.n.01
level2.definition: a linear unit of distance in metric terms

level2.name: organism.n.01
level2.definition: a living thing that has (or can develop) the ability to act or function independently

level3.name: metric_unit.n.01
level3.definition: a decimal unit of measurement of the metric system (based on meters and kilograms and seconds)

level4.name: signal.n.01
level4.definition: any nonverbal action or gesture that encodes a message

level4.name: unit_of_measurement.n.01
level4.definition: any division of quantity accepted as a standard of measurement or exchange

level4.name: whole.n.02
level4.definition: an assemblage of parts that is regarded as a single entity

top_concepts.name: target.n.01
top_concepts.definition: a reference point to shoot at

top_concepts.name: reference_point.n.01
top_concepts.definition: an indicator that orients you generally
